description: This pipeline thresholds an image. The main steps include thresholding the input image and outputting the thresholded image.

200c5809-536c-408c-82e2-136ba98f7b53.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
200c5809-536c-408c-82e2-136ba98f7b53.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

237b7468-0fcd-4e23-ab20-44a887980d7d.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
237b7468-0fcd-4e23-ab20-44a887980d7d.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
